testcase.name: test_parse_story_content_safety
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_comic_storybook_iteration69.py:200: in test_parse_story_content_safety assert response.status_code == 400, f"Should block copyrighted content: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Should block copyrighted content: {"success":true,"scene_count":1,"scenes_preview":[{"scene_number":1,"title":"Spider-Man swings through New York...","description":"Spider-Man swings through New York City, fighting the Green Goblin.","dialogue":null}],"recommended_pages":10,"estimated_credits":50,"word_count":10} E assert 200 == 400 E + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_comic_storybook_iteration69.py:259: in test_generate_validates_style assert response.status_code == 400 E assert 520 == 400 E + where 520 = <Response [520]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_comic_storybook_iteration69.py:276: in test_generate_blocks_copyrighted_content assert response.status_code == 400 E assert 520 == 400 E + where 520 = <Response [520]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_comic_storybook_iteration69.py:297: in test_job_polling assert response.status_code == 200 E assert 520 == 200 E + where 520 = <Response [520]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_static_endpoint_accessible

failure.message: AssertionError: Static endpoint not accessible: 520 assert 520 in [200, 403, 404] + where 520 = <Response [520]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_comic_storybook_iteration69.py:409: in test_static_endpoint_accessible assert response.status_code in [200, 403, 404], f"Static endpoint not accessible: {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Static endpoint not accessible: 520 E assert 520 in [200, 403, 404] E + where 520 = <Response [520]>.status_code
